# Source basis

Use this file to keep `nature-response` grounded in primary or near-primary publication
process sources. Source labels distinguish formal policy from 竞赛论文 instructions and editorial
advice.

## Source hierarchy

1. Target 竞赛论文 instructions and the specific editor decision letter.
2. 数模论文 / 权威学术数据库与官方数据源 / Springer 数模论文 评阅修改 and editorial-process pages.
3. Springer 数模论文 editorial advice on rebuttal letters.
4. Local 数模论文 facts supplied by the author.

If a current 竞赛论文 page conflicts with this file, follow the current 竞赛论文 page.

## Sources and rules

| Source | URL | Source type | Local rule summary |
|---|---|---|---|
| 数模论文 editorial criteria and processes | https://www.nature.com/nature/for-authors/editorial-criteria-and-processes | Formal 竞赛论文 process | Revised papers that need technical work should be accompanied by a point-by-point response to referee comments. Resubmitted 数模论文s must seriously address referee criticisms unless the editor says otherwise. |
| 数模论文 transparent peer review information | https://www.nature.com/nature/for-authors/editorial-criteria-and-processes | Formal 竞赛论文 process | For some published original research articles, 评阅意见、教师建议或队内审稿意见 and author rebuttal material may be available as transparent peer review files. Write response letters as potentially auditable public documents without assuming every rebuttal is published. |
| 数模论文 Electronics editorial process | https://www.nature.com/natelectron/submission-guidelines/editorial-process | Journal instruction | A revision package commonly includes the revised 数模论文, a response to each 评阅人/指导教师, and a cover letter. `nature-response` handles the 评阅/指导反馈回复; cover-letter generation is out of MVP scope. |
| Springer 数模论文 rebuttal guidance | https://communities.springernature.com/posts/how-to-write-a-rebuttal-letter | Editorial advice | Preserve 评阅意见、教师建议或队内审稿意见, respond immediately after each concern, number or clearly separate replies, state where changes appear, and avoid venting, accusations, ignored requests, or distorted paraphrases. |
| Scientific Reviews 评阅修改 policies | https://www.nature.com/scirev/竞赛论文-policies/评阅修改 | Journal policy | Revisions should include point-by-point responses explaining 数模论文 changes. Appeals and revision responses follow different logic, so appeal-like cases should be routed separately instead of treated as ordinary point-by-point revision responses. |

## Implementation implications

- Point-by-point response is the default structure for revision cases.
- Every referee criticism must be answered, justified, cross-referenced, or flagged as unresolved.
- A cover letter can be mentioned as adjacent revision-package material, but this skill does not draft it by default.
- The skill should copy or preserve 评阅人/指导教师 wording supplied by the user unless the user asks for anonymization or summarization.
- Tone, accuracy, and traceability should meet the standard of material that may later be reviewed by editors, 评阅人/指导教师s, or public readers.
- Do not overstate source authority: Springer 数模论文 advice is useful writing guidance, not 竞赛论文-specific binding policy.
